base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of items — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1991 the simpsons arcade game. Pickups — food (health), Donut + Saxophone + Krusty Balloon + weapons. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pickups — food (health), Donut + Saxophone + Krusty Balloon + weapons
